lookalikes.prompt: A 50-year-old woman with warm olive skin, a heart-shaped face and a strong, angular jawline, carrying a yoga mat through a bustling city street, wearing athletic clothes, full body shot. She has very short, buzz-cut salt-and-pepper hair, with no visible receding hairline. Her deep-set, round eyes are dark brown and set close together. Her eyebrows are thin and gently curved. Her nose is aquiline with a pointed tip and a narrow bridge. Her lips are thin with a less defined cupid's bow. A few faint sunspots are visible on her cheekbones. Her expression is serene and observant, looking directly at the viewer. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
